'''鈭歜-h-k''' ('''kabahak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrifurcate|quadrifurcate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-h-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrifurcate|quadrifurcate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-h-k
|-
! Lemma
| kabahak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibahak|thibahak]] || [[word:jibahak|jibahak]] || [[word:shibahak|shibahak]] || [[word:kibahak|kibahak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubahak|thuthubahak]] || [[word:jujubahak|jujubahak]] || [[word:shushubahak|shushubahak]] || [[word:kukubahak|kukubahak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubahak|thubahak]] || [[word:jubahak|jubahak]] || [[word:shubahak|shubahak]] || [[word:kubahak|kubahak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubahak|thubahak]] || [[word:jubahak|jubahak]] || [[word:shubahak|shubahak]] || [[word:kubahak|kubahak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebahak|thebahak]] || [[word:jebahak|jebahak]] || [[word:shebahak|shebahak]] || [[word:kebahak|kebahak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobahak|thothobahak]] || [[word:jojobahak|jojobahak]] || [[word:shoshobahak|shoshobahak]] || [[word:kokobahak|kokobahak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobahak|thobahak]] || [[word:jobahak|jobahak]] || [[word:shobahak|shobahak]] || [[word:kobahak|kobahak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobahak|thobahak]] || [[word:jobahak|jobahak]] || [[word:shobahak|shobahak]] || [[word:kobahak|kobahak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bahak|bahak]] || [[word:bahak|bahak]] || [[word:bahak|bahak]] || [[word:bahak|bahak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bahak|bahak]] || [[word:bahak|bahak]] || [[word:bahak|bahak]] || [[word:bahak|bahak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bahak|bahak]] || [[word:bahak|bahak]] || [[word:bahak|bahak]] || [[word:bahak|bahak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bahak|bahak]] || [[word:bahak|bahak]] || [[word:bahak|bahak]] || [[word:bahak|bahak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bahak|th忙bahak]] || [[word:j忙bahak|j忙bahak]] || [[word:sh忙bahak|sh忙bahak]] || [[word:k忙bahak|k忙bahak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabahak|thathabahak]] || [[word:jajabahak|jajabahak]] || [[word:shashabahak|shashabahak]] || [[word:kakabahak|kakabahak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabahak|thabahak]] || [[word:jabahak|jabahak]] || [[word:shabahak|shabahak]] || [[word:kabahak|kabahak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabahak|thabahak]] || [[word:jabahak|jabahak]] || [[word:shabahak|shabahak]] || [[word:kabahak|kabahak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabahak|shabahak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabahak|goshabahak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabahak|gokishabahak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabahakn眉|shabahakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabahaknkn眉|goshabahaknkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabahakn眉|gokishabahakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabahaksh毛|shabahaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabahaknksh毛|goshabahaknksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabahaksh毛|gokishabahaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabahakro|shabahakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabahaknkro|goshabahaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabahakro|gokishabahakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabahakmu|shabahakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabahaknkmu|goshabahaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabahakmu|gokishabahakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabahaksher|shabahaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabahaknksher|goshabahaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabahaksher|gokishabahaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabahakng|shabahakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabahaknkng|goshabahaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabahakng|gokishabahakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabahakya|shabahakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabahaknkya|goshabahaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabahakya|gokishabahakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabahakyam|shabahakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabahaknkyam|goshabahaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabahakyam|gokishabahakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabahakn眉sh毛|shabahakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabahaknkn眉sh毛|goshabahaknkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabahakn眉sh毛|gokishabahakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabahakn眉ro|shabahakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabahaknkn眉ro|goshabahaknkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabahakn眉ro|gokishabahakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabahakn眉mu|shabahakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabahaknkn眉mu|goshabahaknkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabahakn眉mu|gokishabahakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabahaksh毛n眉|shabahaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabahaknksh毛n眉|goshabahaknksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabahaksh毛n眉|gokishabahaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabahaksh毛ro|shabahaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabahaknksh毛ro|goshabahaknksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabahaksh毛ro|gokishabahaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabahaksh毛mu|shabahaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabahaknksh毛mu|goshabahaknksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabahaksh毛mu|gokishabahaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabahakron眉|shabahakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabahaknkron眉|goshabahaknkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabahakron眉|gokishabahakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabahakrosh毛|shabahakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabahaknkrosh毛|goshabahaknkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabahakrosh毛|gokishabahakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabahakromu|shabahakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabahaknkromu|goshabahaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabahakromu|gokishabahakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabahakmun眉|shabahakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabahaknkmun眉|goshabahaknkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabahakmun眉|gokishabahakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabahakmush毛|shabahakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabahaknkmush毛|goshabahaknkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabahakmush毛|gokishabahakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabahakmuro|shabahakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabahaknkmuro|goshabahaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabahakmuro|gokishabahakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
